sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for SNES port

special_mechanics.name: Jump
special_mechanics.description: Players can jump between higher/lower floors

special_mechanics.name: Slide
special_mechanics.description: Players can slide to avoid enemy attacks

special_mechanics.name: Multi-floor Navigation
special_mechanics.description: Level design features multiple vertical floor levels that players can navigate via jumping

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Qualitative data only. Sources provide game design and feature documentation but no quantitative physics parameters (velocities, acceleration values, gravity constants, frame timings, or sub-pixel precision details). Run-and-gun platformer gameplay with emphasis on mobility and combat rather than precision movement physics.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Sunset Riders (SNES)
